goog.module('dataclass.DataClassInterface$impl');

const $Util = goog.require('nativebootstrap.Util$impl');

/**
 * @interface
 */
class DataClassInterface {
 /** @abstract @nodts @return {number} */
 m_getF__int() {}
 /** @abstract @nodts @return {string} */
 m_component2__java_lang_String() {}
 /** @nodts */
 static $clinit() {
  DataClassInterface.$clinit = () =>{};
  DataClassInterface.$loadModules();
 }
 
 static $markImplementor(/** Function */ ctor) {
  ctor.prototype.$implements__dataclass_DataClassInterface = true;
 }
 /** @nodts @return {boolean} */
 static $isInstance(/** ? */ instance) {
  return instance != null && !!instance.$implements__dataclass_DataClassInterface;
 }
 
 /** @nodts */
 static $loadModules() {}
}
DataClassInterface.$markImplementor(/**@type {Function}*/ (DataClassInterface));
$Util.$setClassMetadataForInterface(/**@type {Function}*/ (DataClassInterface), 'dataclass.DataClassInterface');
